- Q:







What kind of firewood does your company sell?













A:







Hi Pat, the Tree Surgeon sells indoor and outdoor burning fire wood that has been cut 9-12 months ago and is completely DRY not (seasoned) my competitors use that term and it can vary from 6 months to last week. Thanks for asking your question.







Padraig F., Business Owner

Sep 29, 2025









These guys are the real deal. Hard working, incredibly efficient, fair-priced, honest and genuinely good human beings. If only all companies were like this. Tony and his crew spent two days cleaning up my property and pruning large branches that were overhanging my home. They brought a chipper on-site and cleaned everything up before they left. It was amazing how much they accomplished in two days. They removed stumps and went the extra mile on every part of the project. I will definitely use them again.

Mar 25, 2022









I needed to remove some large dead trees and pines that are too close to my house and garage. Also needed a matured oak trimmed and dead branches removed. I sent out 5 requests for quote and Tony was the first to come out to check things out. I received a quote from him the same day. His quote was not the lowest, but after comparing what each company said they would do and how they were going to do it, I decided to go with The Tree Surgeon.



Tony and his crew came out after the ice on he ground had melted and the rains ceased. They got the job done quickly and professionally. Now my front yard is cleared of old debris from years of neglect by previous owners and I feel safer that the tree line is a little further away from my house and garage. Tony treats his customers like his friends and is willing to spend time talking to them and providing advice. I highly recommend The Tree Surgeon

Washington, DC











3



6



1















































































Apr 24, 2021









I contacted the Tree Surgeon because we needed some tall pampas grass cut, but when Tony came by two days later for the estimate he looked around and suggested some additional work (cutting down some dead trees, removing stumps, and general clearing of brush). This was in no way "up selling," but rather Tony taking an interest in our property and sharing some very helpful advice. We agreed on the work to be done for what I thought was a very fair price, and because he had an opening in his schedule Tony and his team were back first thing the next morning. This turned out to be a great break for me. All the work was done expertly, quickly, and when they left I had some great firewood and a huge pile of mulch that we will definitely use. Also, his son climbed up a tree to remove a large, dead branch that I had been worrying about. Tony was very generous with his time and knowledge, giving me some pruning tips and ideas for future plantings. I give him our highest recommendation if you need any of the services he provides.

Sep 20, 2019

Updated review









Superior service, honest advice & guidance about our tree maintenance. We purchased a 2 acre property with many trees that had never been taken care of properly. When Tony came out he walked the property and discussed with us his plan and what he thought would be best. We were confident he knew what he was doing and pleased that he could give us a very reasonable price. Tony, PJ and his crew were great. They are very knowledgeable and experienced and completed a ton of work in just one day including taking some trees down and avoiding our house and fence line, stump grinding, cut and piled the remaining wood into usable lengths, left the wood chips for our use for mulching, trimmed up a few smaller trees, and cleared out some of our flowerbed plants. The price was extremely reasonable compared to other quotes we had gotten from other providers, and they didn't even offer up the extras like Tony and his team did like the wood chips and helping clear out the flower beds. He's got a good heart, too--this house is new to us and the previous owners had lovely landscaping, but it just wasn't us, so we're trying to update it to our tastes. I hated pulling out perfectly good plants and letting them die, so Tony took our plants to an elderly lady he had done some work for who needed some extra plants in her yard. Stuff like that just makes my heart happy. Great work, great price, great people.

metadata.og:title: The Tree Surgeon - Marshall, VA
metadata.og:description: Specialties: The Tree Surgeon has been apart of the Tree Care Industry for 40 years, we are fully insured for the work we advertise and preform, and we also have two ISA Certified Arborists on our staff, our ISA verification number is MA-5919A rest assured, we specialize in both residential and commercial Tree Pruning, Removals, Stump Grinding, Tree Planting, Structural Support Systems, Land Clearing, Whole Property Management, Quality Dry Firewood, Organic deep root Fertilization, Certified Tree Risk Assessment, Storm Damage clean up, Wood Chip delivery. Recently we have added a tree farm and nursery to our company’s assets and allows us to breed and sell beautiful trees and shrubs to our clients at an affordable price. The Tree Surgeon specializes in any arboriculture needs that you may have big or small. Please check our other unreccomended five star reviews to see the rest of our stellar work from our clients. We look forward to hearing from you. Thank you. Established in 1983.  We started as a small company providing high quality tree care in New Jersey in 1983, then we moved to New Zealand in 2007 and started providing high quality tree care down under, then as a business we decided to move back to the United States and plant new roots in northern Virginia and have been operating successfully since 2010. We have certified arborists and qualified tree risk assessors on staff.
